conservative.name: Enforce the Law
conservative.requirements: 8 favour, must be within target jurisdiction. To invoke this blessing, you must have a complete listing of all laws of the target jurisdiction in written format and must read all of it

success.description: As above, and you have managed to internalize the laws. If you are about to break a law, the GM must warn you so that you can choose to do something else instead

reckless.name: Enforce the Law
reckless.requirements: 8 favour, must be within target jurisdiction. To invoke this blessing, you must have a complete listing of all laws in the target jurisdiction in written format and must read all of it

success.description: As above, and you can spot the characteristic flinch of a lawbreaker suffering Verena's punishment - you know if anyone in your line of sight suffers the penalty of this blessing
